approach.title: Our Approach
content: Our mission is to create safe, nurturing spaces of learning and support for street-connected children, particularly child waste pickers and child laborers. This vision is brought to life through our Community Learning Centers, fondly known as Anandghar (A Home of Happiness).

These centers serve as a vital bridge between children, their families, schools, and society. They provide both formal and informal education, along with essential life skills, to children from marginalized and economically disadvantaged backgrounds. Our goal is to prepare them to join mainstream schools, thrive academically, and build a future of dignity and opportunity.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do

items.title: Open doors to education
items.description: We help children read, write, and build strong numerical skills so they can confidently join and stay in mainstream schools.

items.title: Build life skills
items.description: Expression, cooperation, leadership, and self-confidence are at the heart of our sessions.

items.title: Break cycles of child labor
items.description: We work closely with families and schools to ensure children leave exploitative work behind.

items.title: Promote health and well-being
items.description: From hygiene awareness to overcoming substance abuse, we care for the whole child.

items.title: Empower Communities
items.description: We work hand-in-hand with parents, families, and community members to understand child rights, break the cycle of child labor and child marriage—ensuring every child grows up safe, educated, and free to dream.

whatWeDo.footer: The Anandghar program is a holistic model of child development which is completely aligned to the United Nations Convention on the Rights of the Child.

holisticModel.title: A Holistic Model for Child Development
holisticModel.description: The Anandghar program is a holistic model of child development rooted in the values of the United Nations Convention on the Rights of the Child. We believe that when children are given dignity, love, and opportunity, they can rewrite their own futures.

items: Divide in 3 groups as per reading & Writing Comprehension
Nurture child to respective threshold level
Enroll the child in mainstream school
Children leave their profession, becomes part of the school as well as Anandghar

images.label: Safe Spaces to Share, Connect & Reflect
